changes.description: Rewrote skill to use build-script approach instead of client-side D3. Tests check for literal <svg>, <rect>, <path> tags in static HTML source, but D3 generates these dynamically at runtime. New approach: model writes a Node.js generate.js script that reads CSV, computes positions with plain JS math, and writes chart.html with pre-rendered static SVG. Also added strong instructions to always read the input CSV first (baseline used placeholder data).

Fixed date-formatting test failure. Model was using toLocaleDateString() which drops the year. Added explicit instructions to keep dates as raw strings from CSV (e.g. '2026-01-01') and never convert to Date objects for display. Also added warning not to use require('d3') in Node.js build scripts since D3 is browser-only.
